text: Golden dust attack - attacks entities with a beam attack.
Random power - gives out a random elemental power (can be used three times)
Golden dust regeneration - gives a regeneration effect to the player.
$(o)Condition:$() At least one Element Master within 16 blocks.
Golden Chance: 30% chance to gain one of: "Regeneration II", "Star Regeneration II", "Strength II", or "Dash II" for 10 sec when hit.
